positive: An abstract, stylized depiction of a mythical creature merging with natural elements. The main subject is a majestic griffin silhouette, rendered in sharp, bold lines, perched on a crystalline branch. The griffin has feather textures that blend seamlessly into flowing, vine-like energy patterns. The background features a contrasting gradient of deep sapphire blue and vibrant emerald green, creating a cosmic yet organic feel. Style: Geometric vector illustration mixed with neo-tribal art. Composition: Central focus, highly symmetrical, designed for seamless repetition. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic backlighting emphasizing the silhouette. Color Direction: Limited, jewel-toned palette with metallic gold accents. Suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low detail, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, cartoon, photographic
